sql_array: CREATE TABLE search_test (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO search_test VALUES (1, 'Welcome to ClickHouse'), (2, 'Hello World'), (3, 'clickhouse is great');
UPDATE search_test SET text = 'Case Insensitive Test' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsCaseInsensitive(text, ['HELLO', 'world']) FROM search_test WHERE text ILIKE '%hello%';
